ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client application or service */,
  "client_secret" TEXT /* Secret key used for client authentication */,
  "redirect_uri" TEXT /* URI to which the client will be redirected after authorization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the client was created */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the client record */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the client is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the grant */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the grant (e.g., read, write) */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration timestamp of the grant */,
  "grant_type" TEXT /* Type of grant (e.g., authorization_code, client_credentials) */,
  "revoked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grant was revoked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_grants_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client making the connection */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the connected device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the connection (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "connection_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection was established */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity on the connection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_credentials" (
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credential */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device for which the credential is issued */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the credential */,
  "credential_value" TEXT /* Value of the credential (e.g., token or API key) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credential was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration timestamp of the credential */,
  "revoked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credential was revoked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credential_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_credentials_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_credentials_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client making the API call */,
  "endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint that was accessed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., GET, POST, DELETE) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the API call (e.g., success, error) */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to respond to the API call (in milliseconds) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Detailed error message if the status is 'error' */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the API call */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., sensor, actuator) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the device record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last user login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_endpoints" (
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each endpoint */,
  "endpoint_name" TEXT /* Name of the API endpoint */,
  "http_method" TEXT /* HTTP method used for the endpoint (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API endpoint */,
  "rate_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of requests allowed per minute */,
  "is_protected" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the endpoint requires authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
